mapper.select: SELECT A.WORK_HSTRY_SN ,A.USER_ID ,A.WORK_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(A.GTWK_DT, '%H:%i') AS GTWK_DT ,DATE_FORMAT(A.LVWK_DT, '%H:%i') AS LVWK_DT ,A.POWK_SE_CD ,IFNULL(POWK_CD.CD_NM, A.POWK_SE_CD) AS POWK_SE_NM ,A.WORK_RMRK_CN ,A.REG_DT ,A.MDFCN_DT /* 근무 분 계산: 퇴근기록 없으면 현재시각과 비교 */ ,CASE WHEN A.LVWK_DT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, A.GTWK_DT, A.LVWK_DT) AS CHAR) WHEN A.GTWK_DT IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, A.GTWK_DT, NOW()) AS CHAR) ELSE '0' END AS WORK_MINUTES FROM WORK_HSTRY A LEFT JOIN cmn_cd POWK_CD ON POWK_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'POWK_SE_CD' AND POWK_CD.CD = A.POWK_SE_CD AND POWK_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.WORK_YMD = CURDATE() LIMIT 1

SELECT S.SCHDL_SE_CD AS STATUS_CD, IFNULL(C.CD_NM, S.SCHDL_SE_CD) AS STATUS_NM, 'Y' AS SCHEDULE_LINKED_YN, S.SCHDL_NM FROM schdl_info S JOIN schdl_user_rel R ON R.SCHDL_SN = S.SCHDL_SN LEFT JOIN cmn_cd C ON C.CD_GROUP_ID = 'CAL_SCHDL_SE_CD' AND C.CD = S.SCHDL_SE_CD WHERE S.CO_ID = #{coId} AND R.USER_ID = #{userId} AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' AND S.SCHDL_SE_CD IN ('VAC', 'BIZTRIP', 'OUTSIDE', 'HOME', 'CLIENT') AND NOW() BETWEEN S.BGNG_DT AND S.END_DT ORDER BY FIELD(S.SCHDL_SE_CD, 'VAC', 'BIZTRIP', 'OUTSIDE', 'HOME', 'CLIENT'), S.BGNG_DT LIMIT 1
SELECT C.CD AS POWK_SE_CD, C.CD_NM AS STATUS_NM FROM cmn_cd C WHERE C.CD_GROUP_ID = 'POWK_SE_CD' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.SORT_SEQ, C.CD
SELECT C.CD FROM cmn_cd C WHERE C.CD_GROUP_ID = 'POWK_SE_CD' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.DFLT_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.SORT_SEQ ASC, C.CD ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORK_HSTRY ( USER_ID ,WORK_YMD ,GTWK_DT ,POWK_SE_CD ,WORK_RMRK_CN ,REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId} ,CURDATE() ,NOW() ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{powkNm}, ''), ( SELECT C.CD FROM cmn_cd C WHERE C.CD_GROUP_ID = 'POWK_SE_CD' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.DFLT_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.SORT_SEQ ASC, C.CD ASC LIMIT 1 )) ,#{workRmrkCn} ,NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE WORK_HSTRY SET LVWK_DT = NOW() ,MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND WORK_YMD = CURDATE() AND LVWK_DT IS NULL
